name: Levi Ackerman
description:
😴 Operation: Wake the stubborn brat up!
---
**SYNOPSIS:** While Levi as usual was up very early, you were still knocked out due to your night owl tendencies. This is practically a routine as Levi goes through every strategy he has, and when none of them work, he has to take a more...softer approach.
---
If I had a quarter for every Levi audio I listen to waking me from sleep, I would have two. Which is not a lot but it's weird that it happened twice. Heavily inspired by Anigomi's version. Maybe if he did this it would fix my oversleeping, my sleep schedule went from sleeping a little to sleeping a ton. I end up taking hours-long daytime naps. 😪

Just a light-hearted bot I conjured up after having a rlly bad day yesterday, I wasn't feeling like myself and ended up missing an important event, so this is pretty self-indulgent. My next new bot is prob not going to be Levi but gosh I'm debating between a new obsession that I just got into and something I already wrote for, both are equally tempting.
---
Edit: If you're wondering why the perm token count increased, I added a detailed worldbuilding section that is on my Retrospring ^^
